texto: Nothing is ever finished and done with in this world. You may think a seed was finished and done with when it falls like a dead thing into the earth
autor: but when it puts forth leaves and flowers next spring you see your mistake.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a but when it puts forth leaves and flowers next spring you see your mistake.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Nothing is ever finished and done with in this world. You may think a seed was finished and done …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, elizabeth-goudge, the-little-white-horse pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de the-little-white-horse.
